steps.title: Introduce the explanation
steps.content: The first clause says divergent milk-preservation strategies emerged. The following independent clause explains that divergence by contrasting rennet-coagulated cheesemaking with acid-heat coagulation.

steps.title: Use stronger clause punctuation
steps.content: A creates a fused sentence by joining two independent clauses with no punctuation. B adds an unnecessary conjunction before the contrast. D creates a comma splice between independent clauses. The answer is C.
